objective: Materialize public Hugging Face regime-label candidates and test whether they can satisfy the expanded MainRegimeV2 full-universe/full-cycle label blocker.

candidates.label_fit: HMM-derived six-state semantic labels; not direct Bull/Bear/Sideways/Crisis ground truth
binary risk_on/risk_off, not four MainRegimeV2 roots

candidates.coverage_fit: IDX market, not ready yfinance/Kraken matrix
candidates.label_fit: rule-based signal labels; partial mapping to bull/bear/sideways possible, crisis absent

why_not_accepted: BTC HMM6 is public and materialized, but it covers one crypto symbol and two timeframes, and labels are HMM-derived six-state semantics rather than direct four-root MainRegimeV2 labels.
NIFTY50 is public and materialized, but it is binary risk_on/risk_off and one market only.
TSIE appears public and multi-class, but the README describes rule-based IDX labels with no direct Crisis root and no ready yfinance/Kraken full-matrix coverage.
None of the public HF candidates attaches all four MainRegimeV2 roots to every ready yfinance/Kraken symbol/timeframe cell.

next_action: Either build an explicit mapping audit for the HF candidates as limited sidecars, or obtain a true four-root multi-asset multi-timeframe label panel before rerunning accepted 95% calibration.
